$comment: PRESENTATIONAL defs the wire schema's vocabularies block requires (schema/yard-snapshot.schema.json's top-level properties.vocabularies - positions/outcomes/roles/liveness arrays of {id, label, register}; C2R-1, review round 1: a line-number citation here rotted the instant a later commit in this same train (9d53b9c) inserted $defs above it, so this cites the section by its JSON-pointer path, not a line number that further edits can silently invalidate). Recognition VALUES stay owned by schema/vocab/outcomes.json and schema/vocab/roles.json (Law 7 - an unrecognised value is a detector discovery, never a validation failure) and by the mechanism-closed position (design rev 5 S5.2) and liveness (design rev 5 S5.6) sets; this file adds label+register presentation only, never a second recognition gate. THE REGISTER ASSIGNMENTS ARE PINNED (plan 2026-07-23-yard-board-plan.md task 2.4, so no car re-derives them): positions live/bagged/dark are nominal, under-construction is in-progress (design S5.2 table); liveness returned is nominal, dispatched is in-progress, overdue/presumed-lost are needs-attention (design S5.6 gradient); outcomes APPROVE/APPROVE-WITH-REBASE-LIST/REJECT/CONFIRM/done/honest-stop are nominal (REJECT and honest-stop are SUCCESS outcomes in this shop - the gates lane must not run hot on normal traffic), done-with-findings is in-progress, error is needs-attention; roles are all nominal. A value with no def renders by raw id through the detector path (schema/yard-snapshot.schema.json's properties.vocabularies description).
